articles.title: Punjab cop suspended after tying 5-year-old granddaughter to gate in scorching heat - Moneycontrol.com
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Punjab
articles.full_text:
A shocking incident of alleged child abuse has surfaced from Faridkot, where a woman police officer was suspended after a video showed her tying her five-year-old granddaughter to a gate and leaving her in the heat, as reported by NDTV.
The accused, an assistant sub-inspector (ASI), allegedly tied the child’s hands and feet with cloth and left her outside the house gate. The incident came to light after a video showing the child crying in distress went viral on social media, as reported by NDTV.
According to reports, the girl was left tied to the gate in scorching heat conditions, crying profusely while restrained. The visuals triggered outrage after they surfaced online.
Neighbours, who heard the child’s cries, intervened and rescued her, later capturing the incident on video. Police reported that the girl's parents are living in Portugal and have left her in the care of her grandmother.
ASI Sarabjit Kaur is assigned to the Mahila Mitra (women's helpdesk) in Faridkot, according to police sources. After a video went viral, Pragya Jain, the Senior Superintendent of Police in Faridkot, took notice of the situation and suspended ASI Kaur, as per NDTV.
Kaur has been suspended, and the matter has been referred to the child welfare committee. Police said further investigation is underway, as reported by NDTV.
